title: Force Nottingham NHS bosses to face MPs over maternity scandal
description: Former health secretary Wes Streeting says the "cowardice" of leaders who refused to co-operate was "an insult".
content:
Senior staff who refused to engage with the largest maternity scandal in NHS history should be hauled before Parliament, former health secretary Wes Streeting has said.
The review of Nottingham University Hospitals (NUH) NHS Trust found hundreds of b... [4073 chars]

title: Cape Verde threaten shock for the ages before Argentina break hearts in World Cup classic
description: Argentina are into the last 16 of the World Cup but only after a 3-2 extra-time win over a magnificent Cape Verde side
content:
What a game, what a series of moments, what a display of spirit and skill from Cape Verde, a tiny island nation with a far-flung diaspora team, who took Argentina right to the brink of one of the great sporting shocks in Miami.
How to tell the story ... [7747 chars]

title: Scottish firefighters help earthquake rescue efforts in Venezuela
description: Gavin Brown, Ian Hodgson and Brian Richards travelled to South America after the twin earthquakes struck on 24 June.
content:
A team of firefighters from Scotland has been deployed to Venezuela to help communities impacted by two devastating earthquakes.
Gavin Brown, Ian Hodgson and Brian Richards travelled to South America as part of the UK's search and rescue operation af... [2698 chars]

title: Starmer warns Burnham he cannot spend less time on diplomacy
description: Prime minister also speaks of his ‘intensely personal decision’ to step down in first interview since resigning
content:
Keir Starmer has warned his likely successor, Andy Burnham, that it will not be possible to spend less time focusing on international affairs.

title: Trump's new take on 250 years of American expansionism
description: The US has grown, both in terms of its land and its people, over the last 250 years. What's next?
